title: Vermont Judiciary live third-party listing remains publicly exposed for 22-AP-017
incident_classification: live judiciary listing and identity-association risk
summary: A Vermont Judiciary public page continues to list a case entry associated with the name string Justin Ames Gamache v. State of Vermont, docket 22-AP-017, dated 2022-05-13.

sources.source_name: Vermont Judiciary unpublished entry orders page

known_facts: A Vermont Judiciary public source continues to display the case caption Justin Ames Gamache v. State of Vermont.
The listing appears on a judiciary-hosted public source outside user control.
The condition reflects live public listing exposure rather than a broken, removed, or dead-route artifact.

evidence.case_caption: Justin Ames Gamache v. State of Vermont

why_this_matters: This is not a stale dead-link artifact. It is a live third-party public listing and should be treated separately from broken or removed-page search residue.
what_is_not_established: This record does not by itself establish the search-index status of every related subordinate page or document.
This record does not by itself establish whether all related library surfaces are independently surfaced by external search engines.
This record does not convert the judiciary-hosted listing into a user-controlled surface.
desired_end_state: Reduce unnecessary amplification of the listing where possible through broader canonical and suppression strategy.
Preserve technical documentation that this is a live third-party source rather than a broken or removed route.
Maintain classification distinguishing this item from stale-result incidents involving dead URLs or removed personal sites.
root_cause_assessment: This appears to be an active public judiciary listing maintained by a third-party source outside user control. The relevant issue is public discoverability of a live record rather than stale indexing of a removed or broken page.

impact_assessment.summary: The continued availability of a judiciary-hosted live public listing creates an authoritative discovery surface capable of reinforcing identity association through public listing and title-level routing.

governance_rationale: Because the identified listing remains live on a judiciary-hosted public surface outside user control, it should be treated as an active non-academic association source rather than as stale-result or dead-route residue.
actions_taken: Classified the listing separately from stale dead-route incidents.
pending_actions: Evaluate whether any search-layer suppression is available.
